title: MemberDetail
description: Details about a member account in a behavior graph

AccountId.description: The AWS account identifier of the member account.

EmailAddress.description: The AWS account root user email address for the member account.

GraphArn.description: The ARN of the behavior graph that the member account was invited to.

AdministratorId.description: The AWS account identifier of the administrator account for the behavior graph.

Status.description: The current membership status of the member account.

InvitedTime.description: The date and time that Detective sent the invitation to the member account.

UpdatedTime.description: The date and time that the member account was last updated.

VolumeUsageInBytes.description: Data volume in bytes per day for the member account.

VolumeUsageUpdatedTime.description: The data and time when the member account data volume was last updated.

PercentOfGraphUtilization.description: The member account data volume as a percentage of the maximum allowed data volume.

DisabledReason.description: For member accounts with a status of ACCEPTED_BUT_DISABLED, the reason the member account is not enabled.

InvitationType.description: The type of behavior graph membership.
